steps.t: Rúzat has asked you to plant banners along the road leading to Annâk-khurfu and to investigate Khadâsh-gâra. You should plant banners along the road l…
Annâk-khurfu can be found in Elderslade. You should journey to Annâk-khurfu.
Annâk-khurfu can be found in Elderslade. You should talk to Agátur the Boastful at Annâk-khurfu.
